chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 806 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ اَلْجَعْفَرِيِّ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يُصَلِّي فِي جُبَّةِ خَزٍّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.806 - It has been narrated from Sulayman ibn Ja'far al-Ja'fari that He said: "I saw Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) praying in a silk cloak (jubbah made of khazz)."
